entry.title: Re: First sync SAP MDK timeout
entry.content: First thing is to understand where the error is occurring? MDK Client, Mobile Services, or Backend?

entry.title: How to check for SCU updates
entry.content:
How to check if there is any update necessary for the Service Content Update (SCU)?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to check for SCU updates
entry.content:
Resolution:
To check for updates in the Service Content Update (SCU) please follow these steps:

  1. Run the transaction AGS_UPDATE;
  2. Check for new updates.
    If all the boxes are green, it means that all available updates have been applied.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA 2020: Missing Functionality in Fiori - Header...
entry.content: Is My Purchase Requisitions - New, available in S4 private cloud 2023 as well

entry.title: Re: First sync SAP MDK timeout
entry.content: The problem is in MDK Client, when I open the app and there is a message "downloading"... After 3 minutes an error appears. If I limit the API to send $top=1000 it works.

entry.title: Re: How to use LastModifiedDateTime/LastModifiedOn fields correctly in SuccessFactors Odata query
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing!!!

You help me a lot!!

entry.title: Re: new story cannot be saved: "APP_UNAVAILABLE_SELECT_NEW"
entry.content:
This issue is coming because the browser did not get refreshed. Story will not be saved in same page of the browser. 

Resolution (which worked in my case as I was facing the same error)

1. Refresh the browser and re-create same story or make same changes to story you were working with.

or

2. Open new SAC page and create story and save it.

entry.title: Re: Withholding tax not calculated in a SD invoice
entry.content:
The issue with the WHT calculation and it´s integration SD -FI still persist

 

The  WHT Tax Type is defined in the Extended WHT customicing and included in the condition type TWES.

 

 

The condition type  (TWES) in a SD  invoice IS apparently detected and calculated

 

 

The condition type  TWES has the WHT indicator “FL”

 

 

 

 

The invoice printout already calculates the percentage (19%) but it can´t read the WHT indicator, on the opposite side the VAT indicator (R7)is READED AND SHOWN

 

 

FI Posting document without the WHT line because the FL indicator is not read during the posting to FI, but still we don´t know what is missing.

entry.title: Re: Joule "not currently enabled for you" when following SAP Build Code Test Drive Mission
entry.content: If you stop the dev space and start again, Joule ​​is activated immediately. Hope it works for you.

entry.title: Universal Updates for Centralized Services - Onboarding
entry.content:
Hello, in reference to the "Universal Updates for Centralized Services - ECT-233421" it is mentioned in several modules that will be enabled by default. However, onboarding is not explicitly mentioned. Could you please confirm whether it is included as well?
Additionally, I have noticed that in the preview environments, the option to disable this feature is no longer available.
Thanks!

I believe that this Digital Skills Initiative will help me grow professionally and open new doors in my career. I’m committed to learning and excited about the opportunity to obtain the SAP certification.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Remove suggestion from field on Slipstream Personas

I have tried implementing your suggestions to disable history of fields in the advanced options in Slipstream but I am still being proposed values.  Do you have any other suggestions on how to suppress the field input history suggestions?

I am running SP18.

Kindly,

Cristin

entry.title: Re: Converting Standard Payment Medium Format MT100/MT101/MT103 File into XML
entry.content:
Hi @nitindeshpande 

Which concatenation function to be used? Can you please provide the UDF code? 

My requirement is to convert MT101 Flat file to specific XML content.

Flat File:

RJHISARI
101
:20:1000188624
202211290106594
:28D: /
:30: 240929
:50H: 10006080354893
:52A:RJHISARI
:25:149AR
:21:1000188624
:32B:SAR120,40
:52A:RJHISARI
:57A:SABBSARI
:59:/22235666589
Cigala Trading Group
SA RIY
SA-56895 RIYAD
:71A:SHA

 

XML Content:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?>
<PaymentMessage>
<PaymentTransaction>
<CompanyCode>125096997</CompanyCode>
<SequenceNum>202311260105097</SequenceNum>
<TransactionData>:20:202312220105097
:21R:202311260105097
:28D:1/1
:30:231126
:50H:204000010006087354059
Source Add1
Source Add2
Source Add3
:21:202311260105097
:32B:SAR28000,00
:52A:RJHISARI
:57A:ARNBSARI
:59:/SA1230000000002123456789
Destination Add1
Destination Add2
Destination Add3
:70:03
TestTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTMT100Paymentext1
TestTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTMT100Paymentext2
TestTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTMT100Paymentext3
TestTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTMT100Paymentext4
TestTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTMT100Paymentext5
TestTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTMT100Paymentext6
TestTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTMT100Paymentext7
TestTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTMT100Paymentext8
:71A:SHA</TransactionData>
</PaymentTransaction>
</PaymentMessage>

How to proceed with the same? Any suggestion?

entry.title: Re: lcm_cli.bat Query for WebI Reports that Source From S...
entry.content:
Simply add SI_CUID to your select statement.

Select SI_CUID, SI_NAME, SI_AUTHOR, SI_WEBI_DOC_PROPERTIES From CI_INFOOBJECTS, CI_SYSTEMOBJECTS, CI_APPOBJECTS Where PARENTS ("SI_NAME = 'Webi-Universe'", "SI_NAME = 'eFashion'") And SI_KIND = 'WebI'And  SI_INSTANCE = 0

 

Select SI_CUID, SI_NAME, SI_AUTHOR, SI_WEBI_DOC_PROPERTIES From CI_INFOOBJECTS, CI_SYSTEMOBJECTS, CI_APPOBJECTS Where PARENTS ("SI_NAME = 'Webi-Universe'", "SI_NAME = 'eFashion'") And DESCENDANTS("SI_NAME='Folder Hierarchy'", "SI_ID in (23)") And SI_KIND = 'WebI'And SI_INSTANCE = 0

entry.title: Error opening Guided Development in VSCode
entry.content:
Hi,

I have multiple projects in the same "folder" and all of them show 'Green' status.  For one of them when I open the Guided Development it gives me below error:

 "Module '@sap/ux-specification' not installed in project.
But I have it installed and I see the green status.
NPM version 10.9
node.js version v20.18.0
SAP Fiori Tools - Guided Development version 1.51.1
 
I have these under Status of the application.
Latest version of node module '@sap/ux-specification@1.124.2' installed.
Latest version of node module '@sap/ux-ui5-tooling@1.15.1' installed.
Latest version of node module '@sap-ux/ui5-middleware-fe-mockserver@2.2.66' installed.
 
Thanks,
Rutul Thakkar

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing and role of Artificial Intelligence
entry.content:
The manufacturing industry has undergone a significant transformation, progressing from mechanical to electrical to more abstract concepts. With advancements in technologies such as artificial intelligence, we are witnessing the emergence of intelligent, self-operating systems. While sophisticated technologies like robotics, machine learning, and the Internet of Things are not entirely new in manufacturing, their integration into production lines, both in discrete and process manufacturing, has been steadily growing.

Organizations are vying to become intelligent enterprises at a breakneck pace thanks to developments in generative AI. Petabytes of data and millions of smart sensors have made it challenging for big OEMs to use the data meaningfully so that they can act on the data when necessary and gain insights.

SAP Digital Manufacturing solution offers a range of impressive features and functionalities for manufacturing execution and analytics. It facilitates smart factory use cases where intelligent technologies can drive organizations toward greater autonomy, resilience, and sustainability.

SAP's strategic integration of embedded AI into business processes is revolutionizing operations for many organizations that have been deterred by the complexities of developing, maintaining, and deploying AI applications.

One particularly promising application of AI in manufacturing is visual inspection for quality control. Numerous organizations across various industries, including automotive, consumer products, food and beverage, and high-tech manufacturing, are already harnessing the power of machine learning for this purpose. However, generative AI and computer vision hold even greater potential for identifying defects and logging non-conformances in non-traditional and highly customized manufacturing processes.

Another area where many organizations face challenges is manufacturing analytics. The demand for real-time access to relevant manufacturing data on a unified platform is driving the need for innovative solutions. SAP Digital Manufacturing offers a comprehensive solution for deploying AI and ML models on both structured and unstructured data. This foundation enables essential analytics for operational insights and live monitoring, which are crucial for every manufacturing organization.

This architecture empowers users to visualize critical trends and metrics in a single dashboard, eliminating the need to log into multiple systems. The no-code application build platform within SAP Digital Manufacturing allows users to create custom dashboards and leverage SAP Analytics Cloud for embedded analytics. Additionally, features like query designer facilitate the easy creation of key performance indicators (KPIs) based on specific logic.

Line reporting, on the other hand, provides real-time visibility into shop floor processes through Production Operator Dashboards (PODs). Line Monitor PODs enable shop floor schedulers to visualize the execution of shop floor control orders (SFCs) in real time and respond to alerts, scrap, or quality-related non-conformances.

Manufacturing automation is becoming increasingly sophisticated due to technological advancements. This automation has revolutionized the production of goods, boosting efficiency, quality, and innovation. By minimizing human error, automation contributes to higher-quality products and lower defect rates. SAP Digital Manufacturing provides a powerful automation platform, including manufacturing APIs and services, to automate manufacturing processes and integrate different plant systems seamlessly, fostering a connected manufacturing environment.

SAP Digital Manufacturing offers flexible extension options, including "In-App" and "Side-by-side" extension features, enabling seamless integration with other systems and data harmonization. The solution also supports the integration of external machine learning models developed and trained outside of Digital Manufacturing.

Custom-built business services or APIs can be easily integrated into the standard production process. Process extensions may require custom integration flows within the SAP BTP-based integration suite, incorporating various BAPIs, OData, and REST services to connect with digital manufacturing.

The potential of AI in manufacturing and supply chains is immense. Use cases include error identification and root cause analysis, simulation, and outlier detection, and the transformative "actions-to-insights" approach. By integrating AI with process automation and other technologies, organizations can effectively leverage "insights-to-action" capabilities.

To learn more about how SAP Digital Manufacturing will revolutionize your operations, order your copy today. 

Authors : Rahul Kumar (rahul.kumar04@sap.com) , Rohit Dwivedi (r.dwivedi@sap.com) 

https://www.sap-press.com/introducing-sap-digital-manufacturing_5948/

entry.title: removing invoice tag on VF04 items after invoice cancellation
entry.content:
I used VF04 to create a collective billing document for delivered parts.  Unfortunately, I did not select the correct list of sales delivery (SD) documents.  So upon the advice of a co-worker, I cancelled the invoice using VF11.  When I pulled the list of parts again, most of the items had been marked with the cancelled invoice number.  Those items now have "completed" as their status.  I need to create a new invoice, but these items aren't appearing in the billing due list anymore.

I need to strip off the invoice numbers from these items because 1) some of them are not actually billable, 2) the billable items need to go back in the queue to be billed again and 3) the billable items will need to be tagged with the new correct invoice number.

How do I fix this so I can create the invoice correctly?

#sales delivery billing

entry.title: Re: First sync SAP MDK timeout
entry.content:
Hi @vhsbc92,

is it possible for you to test sending the query from the offline store initialization (without pagination) directly to the backend? This can be helpful to determine if the timeout is coming from the backend system. In general, the offline synchronization does not have a timeout and can take very long time.

You could use for example the Launch in Browser option for your backend destination listed in the Mobile Connectivity feature of your app configuration on the SAP Mobile Services cockpit.

Best regards,

Robin

entry.title: Supersonic javascript component not working in apk build?
entry.content:
Hey all - I'm not sure I'll get an answer here but I'll try.  I've made some logic changes to my app after a few months away, and I have a supersonic javascript component (doing websockets) which works perfectly well when previewing the app in the browser.  But the new build process produces an .apk binary that's 1/3rd the size of my previous (successful) builds, and the websocket stuff doesn't seem to be working anymore in .apk form.  Further, there's no debugging available anymore, even via adb, so I'm not even really sure where to start.

Anyone else have a similar issue ("advanced" functionality no longer working in .apks but works fine in web preview)?  If so, what did you do about it?

This app has been working for me for years, and it's frustrating that perhaps now this is the end of the road for it.

Thx

entry.title: Re: Error opening Guided Development in VSCode
entry.content: update your fiori tool to the latest.

entry.title: Re: OpenXML crushes the database
entry.content:
I can see the crash too.  

We'll look into it.

Reg

entry.title: Re: Error opening Guided Development in VSCode
entry.content:
Hi - the Fiori tools is updated to the latest. The latest version is 1.15.1.

Also, I have other projects that do not have this error.

another error - when I try to Preview the application.

node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1228
throw err;

Error: Cannot find module './db.json'

All of these error started to come after VS Code was upated to 1.94.1

Thanks,
Rutul Thakkar

entry.title: Re: lcm_cli.bat Query for WebI Reports that Source From S...
entry.content:
Thanks @ayman_salem, I saw that after I posted the question.

While that solved the error with the query not returning any reports, it was still failing the promotion.

I had to set up the SELECT portion of the statement like this to get a successful promotion:

Select top 10000 static, relationships, SI_PARENT_FOLDER_CUID, SI_OWNER, SI_PATH, SI_NAME, SI_AUTHOR, SI_WEBI_DOC_PROPERTIES

Something in this select statement must have also included the SI_CUID as it is not called out explicitly in the statement.

entry.title: Re: How to set up Catalog Approval flow base on Commodity...
entry.content:
Hey Srinivas,

I think that field you're referring to is using the categories tied to the supplier, not the catalog content itself.  

But I think this link is relevant for what you're trying to do.  You'll have to activate the CMS feature to get access to these configs:  Approval of Subsets of Items in a Customer Catalog 

Rgds,

Andrew

entry.title: Docker Image SQL Anywhere 17
entry.content:
I am beginner with Docker Containers and looking for an Image for have a containerized instance of SQL Anyhwhere 17.

I found one in Docker Hub and tried it, it is running, but it has the version 16, where can I find the 17 version, and is it possible to make my own image?

Another point which I dont understand, how would the license problem solved? Or the image itself does not need license, but only the client who is connecting to it would need it?

 

Any comment is welcomed.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HC - How to download Payment advice XML data?

When I filter the payment method with *CGI_XML_CT*, it does not return any data.

Regards,

Tri

entry.title: Re: Cross Company Sales Return Process
entry.content:
Hi Vivek,

can you please indicate what scope item you are using for the processing of the intercompany return?.. If you are using Intercompany Process for Customer Returns (2F4), this best practice does include a step for quality inspection at either the intercompany site or at the customer site. Either one of these options could help in your case.

However, SF4 requires separate activation and additional manual setup steps.

Please elaborate. Thanks,

-Carlos

entry.title: Re: Integrate Sharepoint online with Datasphere
entry.content: Thanks Koray! For step 3 Create a connection from Open Connector to Sharepoint (https://help.openconnectors.ext.hana.ondemand.com/home/sharepoint-api-provider-setup) What is the redirect URI look like?

entry.title: Re: Problems with SAP Lumira application (version 2.4.0.4...
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

in a side note the PAM for Lumira 2.4 states "SAP BW/4HANA FPS1 is supported from SAP Lumira 2.4 SP00 Patch 7+ Onwards. I think there is no way around upgrading to Patch 7 (and as prerequisite if applicable also upgrading your BI Platform to 4.3 SP3 Patch 6 or higher).

 

Kind regards

Jonas

entry.title: Re: Can we prevent posting in Leading Ledger by closing periods in NLL?
entry.content: Did you get an answer to this? Have this issue as well

entry.title: Re: No service provider was defined for CoCd XXXX
entry.content:
Solution: go to configure value mapping ->     namespace: /EDOMX     value mapping: SERVICE_PROVIDER

This for México.

Regards

entry.title: Interface from ECP to FI via Azure File Share
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently using SFTP to send payroll posting files from ECP to an external FI system.

Is it possible to use AZURE file share instead? What are the pre-requisites please?

Thank you,

entry.title: Adapt UI in Customizing Tenant
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

When we want to extend fields in an app we normally have to adapt UI. 

This would mean that we have to see the screen of the app itself for us to specifically place this field, but this has to be done in Customizing Tenant.

Some data customizations are hard to do in Customizing System due to the lack of data and have to do a lot of configuration.

Is there a better way to adapt UI or it really has to be done this way?  

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Adapt UI in Customizing Tenant
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

 

It is not prohibited to Adapt UI in Test or Productive Systems, however, you need to be careful and don’t mix systems or clients when you make UI changes.

When you adapt the UI of an app, in this case it’s important that you make the UI changes only in the test environment and then transport or copy them to your productive environment.

For example: Adapt the UI in the test system only and transport the changes to the productive system or Adapt the UI in the test client only and copy the changes to the productive client.

 

Your productive system or client doesn't prevent you from making UI changes there, but it's important that you do not mix these scenarios for one app (that is, making changes in both the test and the productive environment).

This would lead to severe UI adaptation conflicts.

If you don't have or don't use a test system or client, please do everything in the productive environment.

 

Kind regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Error opening Guided Development in VSCode
entry.content: yes, looks the latest is not available yet, so you have to downgrade to 1.93

entry.title: Re: Error opening Guided Development in VSCode
entry.content: I have tried downgrading to 1.93 and still getting the error.

entry.title: SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My name is Erline, and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about me: I am a recent IT Management graduate with extensive knowledge in both business and technology. I currently hold six industry certifications, including CSM, ITILv4, and Security+, and I work as an Operations Analyst at a medical device company, where I gain hands-on experience in procurement, quality assurance, and much more.

I’m currently working towards my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Vower learning group, and I’m eager to expand my knowledge in all areas of SAP.

I’m especially excited about obtaining this certification because it will allow me to continue doing what I do best—delivering a wealth of knowledge and solutions to our customers while opening up broad career opportunities for me.

I’m also open to connecting with others who share an interest in technology, supply chain, and related fields.

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

Best regards,

Erline Mercier
Operations Analyst

entry.title: [BYD] How to extend the label digit length to be 8 digits or more?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support

We want to use the labels on our logistics processes together with the scanner device, we want to be able to do stock counts, inbound and outbound tasks using the scanner, but on the GTIN field on the product master, it does not accommodate less that 8 digit number, but the system only generate 4 digit code number for bar code labels. your assistance will be more appreciated to point us on the right direction or providing a solution to us

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: [BYD] How to extend the label digit length to be 8 di...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

I believe below help portal would answer your question.

Configuration: Bar Code Type UCC/EAN 128 | SAP Help Portal

 

Best regards,

Gavan

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Transport a project between clients in Migration Cookpit
entry.content:
We need a help, to solve a problem.
We need you tell us the steps, exactly, how to transport a project between clients in Migration Cookpit. 
We need transport the project the client DH0-650  to DH0-550 and DH0-110. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Transport a project between clients in Migration Cookpit
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Thanks for contacting SAP. I have picked this case manually to speed up.

For "Migrate Data Using Staging Table" approach, you can transfer the migration project to another client using LTMOM as per Using a Project in a Different Client | SAP Help Portal.

->Using a Project in a Different Client

By default, you can only view and edit projects in the client where they were created. It is only possible to edit a project in one client in the system. If you want to view and edit a project in a different client, you need to use the SAP S/4HANA migration object modeler (transaction LTMOM) to change the settings for a project so that it can be used in that client. To do this, open the relevant project and choose GoTo  Use Project in Different Client.

Note that all mapping tasks are deleted. This means that you need to download the mapping tasks before you proceed. You can then upload the mapping tasks in the new client.

Example

You create a migration project in client 100. You want to edit the project in client 200. In client 200, you open the project in transaction LTMOM and choose GoTo  Use Project in Different Client. In the SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit, you can now view and edit the project in client 200. It is no longer possible to edit the project in client 100.

For "Migrate Data Directly from SAP System" approach, you cannot do this process using LTMOM. You need to create a new migration project manually in the new client.

Best regards,
Ron
SAP Support

entry.title: How to configure SAP Cloud Identity Services with Microsoft Entra for automatic user provisioning.
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have  a requirement to sync all users from SAP Cloud Identity Services to Microsoft Entra . 

Here are the steps which I followed 

1) Created new administrator as system and configured all the permissions.

 

2) Created a new  sourcing system  as type Local Identity Directory and  added Type field as Identity Provisioning under properties 

3) Created a new  Target System with all properties specified from following link( https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/target-microsoft-entra-id)

 

4) Configured real time identity provisioning 

5) Test connection is fine but when I click on provisioning .It shows 14 out of 19 users are provisioned but in provision logs it says entity skipped 

I am able to sync users from entra to SAP CIS but not from CIS to entra .Please let me know am I missing any configurations here ?

entry.title: Re: BW4HANA Open hub data for "JPY", "IDR" currency is no...
entry.content: Thank you Roland.

entry.title: About the Removal Tool for Maintenance Customers
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 


Thank you for your help. 
We have a customer who will no longer be covered by maintenance, and we have a question about how to handle this.
As a response, we are considering changing the users of customers who are no longer covered by maintenance to unusable,
but are there any tools or procedures on the SAP side for when a customer is no longer covered by maintenance?
Thank you for your confirmation.


----------


ご担当者様


お世話になっております。
保守対象外になるカスタマがあり、その対応について質問があります。
対応としては、保守対象外になったカスタマのユーザを使用不可に変更することを考えておりますが、
SAP側でカスタマが保守対象外となった際に対応するツールまたは手順はありますでしょうか。
ご確認よろしくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: About the Removal Tool for Maintenance Customers
entry.content:
Dear *,

Yes, from SAP support side, you can change the users of customers who are no longer covered by maintenance to unusable, or remove or limit certain permissions for the users of customers no longer covered by maintenance.

For further contract-related questions or issues, Could you please contact SAP Order Management by e-mail for the contract-related issue? They do not work within the case application. You can check the KBA 1660069.
##1660069 - How to contact SAP Order Management for contract-related questions or issues

Best regards,
Leo
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Task Lists With Goods Services in Fiori
entry.content: Bump this for a solution?

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi!

I am Sheena May Del Valle, from Pennsylvania, USA. I graduated with a degree in Business Administration in the Philippines. I moved to the US 3 years ago and I am still trying to establish my career in the business field since I started off as a healthcare technician. It is difficult to penetrate the corporate companies even with a degree because I have no corporate experience here in the US. Most of my background is running a small family business as well as my own business back in the Philippines.

I believe that with my experience, skills and education, I will succeed in the Tech Industry by dedicating my time in learning the SAP and continuously learning business trends. 

If given a chance, I would like to focus in SAP Supply Chain Management.

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: How to get "marked for Deletion" and "Blocked Items o...

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP : Enabling custom actions with a dialog for additional input fields

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello!

 

My name is Rafael, and I’m from Brazil. I am 20 years old and currently in my 4th semester majoring in Computer Science. Unfortunately, I lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for myself. However, I am determined to dig into SAP ABAP specifically. My interest was sparked by my own curiosity and the influence of my older brother, who has been a SAP ABAP developer for 5 years. 

 

I already have some practical experience with this programming language. I’ve completed several projects on my own and have been studying it for the last 10 months. During this period, I took courses from ABAP experts but never had the opportunity to learn from official SAP sources or obtain an SAP certification. I hope to achieve my first certification through this project.

 

Regards,

 

Rafael Ienne.

entry.title: Re: Everything you need to know about: SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
@simcap  ,

 

1. is it possible to use standard library in SSF or can we upload the attributes manually?

Both! You could start with the free Skillsplex Library, that has around 10k skills. Its been around for a while and not recently updated, however this gives a good starting point and most skills are still relevant.

2. is it possible to implement intelligent hub without using JPB?(new implementation)

You could but not advisable, you won't get much value out of it. limited use case. 

3. in SSF, is there any standard library that we can find to enable TIH?

yes, Skillsplex. Its mentioned in my blog.

I have a question about copying business partners when creating an Outbound Delivery from an STO PO(Stock Transport Order).

entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Seeking valuable insights on go-live strategies for SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public edition, specifically in big-bang vs. phased implementation approaches.

1. Pros and cons of mid-year vs. year-end big-bang go-live?

2. Key considerations for phased go-live in the public cloud environment, especially from a data migration perspective.

Your expertise on this matter is highly appreciated. Thank you for your time and feedback!

entry.title: Re: Extracting texts from GuiUserArea w/o ActiveX control (just built-in feature of iRPA)
entry.content: I've already encountered this type of issue, and I hope someone will answer it

entry.title: UNGA TAKES ON DIGITAL GOVERNANCE
entry.content:
UNGA TAKES ON DIGITAL GOVERNANCE

For New Yorkers, the end of September brings chaos every year -- traffic jams, road closures, VIP motorcades and no available tables at any decent restaurant on the east side. It’s not that easy to disrupt the operations of a city that hosts over 13 million people most workdays but it’s possible when world leaders gather at the UN Headquarters for the opening session of the UN General Assembly (UNGA). UNGA typically addresses a broad spectrum of global concerns -- war, poverty, climate change, global economy and sustainability. This year was no different. Conflicts in the Middle East, Ukraine and great power conflict dominated, but as has been true in recent years, digital policy issues muscled their way onto the crowded policy agenda. Two specific initiatives were advanced: the Global Digital Compact (GDC) and the UN Convention Against Cybercrime. This article will provide a basic overview of these programs and assess their potential impact on the digital regulatory landscape in 2025 and beyond.

Global Digital Compact

The centerpiece of UNGA 2024 was the Summit of the Future, a project to adapt global cooperation to the realities of the modern world. It took place on September 22 – 23 and resulted in the adoption of the Pact for the Future, a policy document which articulates a vision for international collaboration on themes including peace and security, sustainable development, climate change, digital cooperation, human rights, gender, youth and future generations, and the transformation of global governance. The Global Digital Compact, incorporated into the Pact as an addendum, is a comprehensive framework for governance of digital technology and artificial intelligence. It charts a collaborative roadmap for harnessing the potential of digital technology and reducing digital divides based on six (6) guiding principles: Universal Connectivity, Human Rights Online, Digital Inclusion and Equity, Safe and Secure Digital Environment, Digital Innovation for Sustainable Development, and Fostering Trust in Technology.

To achieve these principles, the GDC sets objectives and actions in each of the following five categories:

  • Expanding Digital Infrastructure Development, especially to underserved regions.
  • Establishing global regulatory frameworks that guide the use and ethical development of AI
  • Ensuring that data privacy rights are respected globally.
  • Combatting misinformation, hate speech, and cybercrime through regulations, transparency mandates, and real-time monitoring systems.
  • Promoting green technology initiatives and digital tools that combat climate change.

By adopting the Pact for the Future, to include the GDC, the UN is elevating data governance on the global diplomatic agenda. Nonetheless, both he Pact and the GDC are non-binding. As such, execution and enforcement of the principles contained in the GDC will only occur through national, regional and local legislation and regulation. Only time will tell whether member states will choose to take action on the objectives contained in the GDC and map their own regulatory vehicles to the GDC guidance.

UN Convention on Cybercrime:

On August 1, 2024, the UN Ad Hoc Committee on Cybercrime adopted the Comprehensive International Convention on Countering the Use of Information and Communications Technologies for Criminal Purposes (the “UN Convention Against Cybercrime”). This was the culmination of over five years of often contentious negotiation between two broad coalitions of nations with starkly different views of how such a treaty should be applied. Proposed by Russia in 2019, the Convention was initially opposed by signatories to the Budapest Convention on Cybercrime, the 2004 Council of Europe framework which established certain categories of cyber-crimes, established protocols of international cooperation and built safeguards to ensure civil liberties. Unable to prevent the UN convention from moving forward, Budapest signatories, such as the US, EU and others eventually joined the drafting process to ensure proper consideration of civil liberties and other provisions of concern.   

The current draft outlines multiple objectives focused around controlling the use of technology that can facilitate firearm and drug trafficking, terrorism, and other transnational crimes. It stresses a need for member state coordination on legislative fronts to enforce the provisions of the convention. Critics claim, however, that the text’s scope is too broad, allowing countries to apply it to offenses beyond what were typically considered cybercrimes in the past. Opponents include human rights and privacy advocates and big tech companies. Both factions have concerns over text that says authorities investigating crimes in any nation are entitled to electronic evidence and ISP data from other nations. Privacy groups have expressed concerns of inappropriate monitoring of global information flows. Industry leaders are also concerned that it could keep security researchers from reporting vulnerabilities they detect in networks and other tech systems because they will be more likely to fear prosecution under the treaty’s language.

Though no formal action was taken on the UN Convention during High-level Week in September, it was the subject of much discussion. Despite all the controversy, the convention is expected to be adopted by the UN General Assembly in late 2024 or early 2025. Once adopted, the treaty will be open for countries to sign and will enter into force 90 days after the 40th country ratifies it. Some countries may need parliamentary approval to ratify the treaty. Nonetheless, it will remain controversial and global application and enforcement of the treaty will likely remain uneven with different countries selectively interpreting provisions that suit politically expedient purposes.

entry.title: Re: Estimated Annual Usage
entry.content: how do we maintain the EAU and where?

entry.title: the value of group valuation for intercompany subcontracting is not correct
entry.content:
Hi, Guru,

We are encountering one issue regarding intercompany subcontracting and group valuation. We found that the output result of the group valuation is not correct for the intercompany subcontracting transactions. Here is the business scenario.
Company code A and company code B are manufacturing companies. Company C is a trading company. All these three companies are individual legal entities within one corporation group.
Company B issues subcontracting purchase orders to company A to produce finished products. The raw materials and packaging materials are provided from company B to company A as free of charge materials.
Company A produces the products with the raw materials and packaging materials that are provided by company B. So, the cost in the production orders is activity cost only (e.g., labor cost, depreciation cost, and other overhead cost, etc.)
Once the production orders are completed, the products are received in warehouse by goods receipt by company A. Subsequently company A issues goods to company B and issues billing documents to company B as the subcontracting service fee (manufacturing overhead cost, plus markup).
Company B posts good receipts against the subcontracting purchase orders and post invoice verification as well.
Company C issues intercompany STO to company B. Company B posts goods issue against the STO and issues the billing documents based the delivery notes from the STO. Consequently, the goods receipt and invoice verification are posted automatically in company C.
However, we found that even though the above scenario is the standard process that can be managed by the SAP system, the group valuation from company B and company C cannot reflect the activity cost components from company A. Rather than that, the cost components from company A displayed in company B or C is the subcontracting fee. That means the cost from the group valuation perspective is higher than the actual cost.
So, we are wondering if the group valuation can manage the scenario of intercompany subcontracting process? Is there a notes that we can implement to realize the group valuation for intercompany subcontracting business?

Looking forward your feedback

Liu Jun

entry.title: Re: Ho to create a Testuser for RAP App in BTP?
entry.content: you have use Maintain Employees app first, then  use maintain business users.

entry.title: Sales orders for semi-finished products cannot run out of planned orders after running MRP
entry.content: Now there is a sales order for semi-finished products. I want to run the planned order through the sales order, but the display interface in MD04 is empty, but the planned order can be run through MD61. I checked that the master data MRP type is PD and policy is 70. Check that the plan category in the sales order is CP. I don't know what the problem is now. I hope you experts can help me look at this problem

entry.title: Re: How to mange and distribute fix in custom package to customers
entry.content: https://abapgit.org/ 😉

entry.title: Re: From Parallel Accounting to Universal Parallel Accounting and a focus on Parallel valuation
entry.content:
Very helpful material on the background for UPA (I love the std cost estimate for each acctg principle).  My concern has to do with the restrictions on using it, from the latest note indicating that Parallel COGM cannot be used, and EBRR must replace Results Analysis.

Since currency and valuation profiles are now obsolete, I consider this "1 ledger - 1 valuation" type of configuration.  Add as many as you need, and the ledger drives the valuation.

I would like more information on the best "no-regrets" setup for a greenfield implementation where the client is not 100% sure about going forward with UPA as it is a large step change but wants to keep the door open towards using it in the future.

And, can't wait for blog #2!

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: SAP ASE SDK Windows 11
entry.content:
Hi Jose,
Yes, SDK for SAP ASE 16.0 has certification on Windows 11 x64.
You can jump to Product Availability Matrix (PAM) page from KBA 2497029:
2497029 - How to check connectivity product certification information for SAP ASE SDK https://me.sap.com/notes/2497029

I attached the screenshot for PAM.

Hope this helps.
Best regards,
Masahiro

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

Mabuhay!

I’m a Filipino fresh graduate currently working as a Junior Associate in a BPO that specializes in accounting and finance. I wanted to express my genuine interest in this opportunity because I’m really eager to get a headstart in my career.

This certification seems like the perfect fit for my career goals. I’m committed to continuous learning and professional growth, and I believe this certification will provide me with invaluable knowledge and skills. I’m looking forward to the possibility of gaining hands-on experience with SAP and ERP systems through this program.

Thank you and regards,

Ross Cabuya

entry.title: SAP BAS - CDS Watch does not display data
entry.content:
Team:

I created a project in SAP BAS. The project is quite simple contains three tables and the services should  produce three tables and a view collecting fields from the tables. Unfortunately, cds watch does not display any data. I received a message {

  • @odata.context: "$metadata#Customers",
  • value: [ ]

}

What could be the problem?

entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

entry.title: Re: How to mange and distribute fix in custom package to...
entry.content:
I would point out to the customer that using Git for code management has got to be safer and more secure than relying on a developer to manually copy code from one place to the other.

I would also point out that using a tool to update ABAP artefacts in your development system is no different to having a developer do the same thing.

And finally, if using Git for code management is good enough for their non-ABAP development teams (which it almost certainly is) why isn't is good enough for the ABAP team?

😎

entry.title: Using BAPI delivery order to PGI through API
entry.content:
Hello Experts!!!

 Based on STO we create auto generated delivery order using API where BAPI ''BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CREATE_STO"  used. Right now similar way we need to complete the delivery order line wise using BAPI through API completed with PGI where update S.Loc (LGORT) and Picked Qty (PIKMG) .I created a custom BAPI and its work for 15 records after that its gave error.

Please guided me. Attachment given as reference.

entry.title: Re: How to get list all data in Tcode CKMLQS
entry.content: I try with ST05 and solved the problem. It's base on tables: ckmlhd mldoc ml4h_cds_mv003 ml4h_cds_mv004

entry.title: Re: Cross Company Sales Return Process
entry.content:
Hello Carlos, 

Thank You for your prompt response. 

For the intercompany return process, we are using the Intercompany Return Process for customer returns (2F4). Our business requirement is that whenever we do Post Goods Receipt for returns, material valuation should not happen immediately. It should only happen after quality inspection.

In the Customer Return Process (BKP), we have a suspend valuation option where we can control the material valuation.

So, my question is how we can achieve this requirement in the case of the Intercompany Return Process for customer returns (2F4).

Best Regards 

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: Remote Client copy without Personal data (PA Tables)
entry.content: Hi Mari, Could you explain in details about the source production system client and target development system client details?

entry.title: Re: Company Certificate Management & Check Certificate Statuses in SAP
entry.content: I found this article highly informative and relevant to my work. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Query with Last Invoice Date
entry.content:
Hi,

try this

SELECT
	 OCRD.CardCode
	,OCRD.CardName
	,(
		SELECT
			MAX(T0.DocDate)
		FROM
			OPCH T0
		WHERE
			T0.CardCode = OCRD.CardCode
			AND
			T0.CANCELED = 'N'
	 ) AS [Last purchase invoice date]
FROM 
	OCRD 
WHERE
	OCRD.CardType = 'S'

regards LOthar

entry.title: Pop up when using Post goods receipt for Purchasing document
entry.content:
Hi All

We recently activated Scope Item 5HN which allows you to post Synchronous goods receipt and avoid the Inbound delivery. Now the App: Post Inbound delivery had one advantage compared to the other process. It would give you a Pop-up that displayed the text from the PO (Header Note) when you entered the PO.  

Now 

Now my Question is: Is possible to create this Pop-up for the App: Post goods Receipt for Purchasing Document? 

The App itself is very good but sadly it does not display any texts that are either in the Header of the PO oder the Item level texts. i think maybe it is possible to create a custom logic but my skills are not advanced enough for that. maybe i am missing something obvious.

entry.content: Very helpful blog, Helped me solve my issue

entry.title: Re: SAP ERP Central Component
entry.content:
Hi Waddah,

In the SAP ECC system, all the standard table field descriptions are available while you browse the table using the transaction code SE16, in the case of a custom table you may have to define.

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Business Catalog missing in App "Manage Launchpad Pages"
entry.content:
Hi @sebastian_wilhelm1,

does it appear under "Manually Selected"? Did you assign a launchpad app descriptor item to the IAM app in ADT?

Best regards
Kai

entry.title: Agent user required for installing diagnostic agent
entry.content:
When installing the diagnostic agent, do I need to connect to Solution Manager java and create an agent user?

Please confirm.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Agent user required for installing diagnostic agent
entry.content:
Dear customer,

For a newly installed Diagnostics Agent, you need to prepare a NetWeaver UME user for initial connection to SAP Solution Manager NetWeaver Java Application Server.

Please refer to instruction in step 1.2) of below KBA:

2385361 - How to connect Diagnostics Agent to SAP Solution Manager 7.2 system - SAP for Me

To use the Root Cause Analytics function of Solution Manager, it's required to connect the Diagnostics Agent to Solution Manager java. For a newly installed Diagnostics Agent, you need provide FQDN where SAP Solution Manager Java SCS instance is located, Java SCS Message Server HTTP Port and Credentials with User, Password. Please have a look at step 2) Diagnostic Agent Installation in above link.

Please do not hesitate to let us know if you have questions.

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: We are looking for a Technology, Software, Gas, Oil, and Energy niche website.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are currently seeking websites in the Technology, Software, Gas, Oil, and Energy sectors. If you own or manage a website in any of these niches, please send the details to ashish.amoli@bursys.com. Additionally, if you know any journalists or reporters working in these fields, kindly share their LinkedIn profiles and email addresses so we can connect with them directly.

Thank you!"

entry.title: Re: Ho to create a Testuser for RAP App in BTP?
entry.content:
Hi @sebastian_wilhelm1 ,

did you have a look at https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-btp-abap-environment/abap-environment/identity-and-access-management-iam and https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-btp-abap-environment/abap-environment/apps-identity-and-access-management?

Additionally, https://developers.sap.com/group.abap-env-authorizations.html might be helpful.

Best regards
Kai
